creator: fjpavon@gmail.com
text:
Dear all
I have an issue related to an usb mouse. It's wireless mouse and it's working in windows and debian. The description of the device it's ok but the system recognoized as a keyboard...

root@claire:~ # usbconfig show_ifdrv | grep 1.6
ugen1.6: <Newmen Tech.,LTD 2.4G Wireless Mouse> at usbus1, cfg=0 md=HOST spd=FULL (12Mbps) pwr=ON (46mA)
ugen1.6.0: ukbd1: <Newmen Tech.,LTD 2.4G Wireless Mouse, class 0/0, rev 1.10/1.19, addr 5>

Thnaks and kind regards

Francisco Pavon
